title: BEM-866 inline heartbeat check
objective:
Run script:
"""
heartbeat = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_QUEUE_STEP_INLINE_HEARTBEAT.md')
queue = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
processed = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
result_file = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json')
response = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md')
text = response.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if response.exists() else ''
ok = 'Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' in [line.strip() for line in text.splitlines()]
hb_text = heartbeat.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if heartbeat.exists() else ''
result_text = result_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if result_file.exists() else ''
if ok:
    status = 'CLAUDE_WRITE_OK'
elif result_file.exists() and 'DISPATCHED' in result_text:
    status = 'DISPATCHED_WAITING_CLAUDE_WRITE'
elif result_file.exists() and 'DISPATCH_FAILED' in result_text:
    status = 'DISPATCH_FAILED'
elif heartbeat.exists() and queue.exists():
    status = 'HEARTBEAT_EXISTS_QUEUE_PENDING'
elif not heartbeat.exists() and queue.exists():
    status = 'HEARTBEAT_MISSING_QUEUE_PENDING'
elif processed.exists():
    status = 'QUEUE_PROCESSED_NO_RESULT'
else:
    status = 'UNKNOWN'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_INLINE_HEARTBEAT_CHECK_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 inline heartbeat check\nStatus: ' + status + '\nHeartbeat exists: ' + str(heartbeat.exists()) + '\nQueue exists: ' + str(queue.exists()) + '\nProcessed exists: ' + str(processed.exists()) + '\nResult exists: ' + str(result_file.exists()) + '\nClaude write OK: ' + str(ok) + '\n\nHeartbeat text:\n' + hb_text[:1000] + '\n\nResult text:\n' + result_text[:1000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('inline heartbeat check: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
